## Claims & Copyright Checklist
**Required before merge:**
- [ ] All public claims on this branch are verified against `docs/website/CLAIMS_MATRIX.md`
- [ ] No third-party copyrighted content has been added without license verification in `docs/website/COPYRIGHT_LICENSE_REGISTER.md`
- [ ] All legal/compliance text has been reviewed by leadership (if applicable)
- [ ] No unsupported testimonials, certifications, or metrics are present

## Testing
- [ ] Local build passes: `npm run build`
- [ ] Local lint passes: `npm run lint`
- [ ] Contact form tested in preview deployment
- [ ] Responsive design verified on mobile/tablet/desktop

## Pre-Merge Sign-Off
- [ ] Code review complete
- [ ] Claims verification complete
- [ ] No blocked conversations
